pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace jackson-module-jaxb-annotations with jackson-module-jakarta-xmlbind-annotations for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact uses javax.xml.bind annotations which are removed/renamed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors or missing class issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 may trigger warnings or incompatibilities; release is the standard way to set language level and bootstrap classpath.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+; using the old java.sun.com namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors because the container expects jakarta.* packages and descriptors.
